title: Slash Commands
subtitle: Create one global prompt that every harness can use or customize.
errorDescription: Try refreshing the local data, or select another option in the sidebar.
deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The selected slash commands will be permanently removed.
emptyDescription: Create one command to define a reusable prompt that works across harnesses.

review.title: Slash commands to review
review.subtitle: {{count}} slash command needs a review decision.
review.subtitle_plural: {{count}} slash commands need a review decision.
review.subtitleEmpty: No slash commands need review across your harnesses.
review.emptyDescription: No unmanaged slash commands or config differences were detected across your harnesses.

form.description: Slash commands define reusable prompts that AI agents can invoke. Each command works across one or more harnesses.
form.promptPlaceholder: The instructions the AI agent will follow...
form.validationError: Please fix the errors above before saving.

tooltips.restore: Restore the managed command content to match the Skill Manager source.
tooltips.adopt: Use this harness command as the managed version in Skill Manager.
tooltips.removeBinding: Stop tracking this harness command in Skill Manager.
tooltips.adoptReview: Adopt this command into Skill Manager
